task_completion.description: A report is created at /home/ga/Documents/emns_remediation.txt listing the full names of all modified users.

integrity.description: The agent used the 2N Access Commander web interface to identify and update the users.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the 2N Access Commander web UI in a browser, rather than exclusively using curl/API commands in the terminal to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent only modified users who were missing information, rather than bulk-overwriting all users.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the user list should show that other users (not in the target list) retain their original, distinct emails and phone numbers.

integrity.description: The agent created the report file manually or via standard terminal commands based on its findings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using a text editor (like nano, gedit) or echo/cat commands in the terminal to write the specific names it found into the emns_remediation.txt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target users missing email: Marcus Webb, Fatima Al-Rashid, Tomás Guerrero. Target users missing phone: Leon Fischer, Fatima Al-Rashid, Rachel Goldstein. All modified users (must be in the report): Marcus Webb, Leon Fischer, Fatima Al-Rashid, Tomás Guerrero, Rachel Goldstein. Expected email format: <firstname>.<lastname>@pending-review.local (all lowercase). Expected phone format: +1-000-000-0000. No other users should be modified or included in the report.
